series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains lab slips and lab slip information that reports the incidence of sexually transmitted diseases (includes HIV virus). The confidential lab slips are received in the office, entered onto the computer, and the slips are immediate

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded or information is replaced with new, updated information ; Paper: Retain until the information is entered into the computer, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
